description: Covers the programming concepts and skills for understanding construction and implementation of high quality spatial web portal and mobile Apps to support geospatial data access, analysis, sharing, and synthesis over the internet. Builds on basic programming experience.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (GEOG 170,GEOG 370, orCIV ENGR/​ENVIR ST/​GEOG  377) and (GEOG 378,COMP SCI 300, COMP SCI 369, orCOMP SCI 400), or graduate/professional standing
